title: CulturalInstitution
description: A member of the Cultural Institutions Group (CIG) and its annual operating support from DCLA — the ~34 major institutions (museums, zoos, gardens, performing-arts centers) sited on City-owned property that DCLA funds directly. Canonical schema reconciling 'DCLA Cultural Institutions Group Funding' (ka27-qx5k, 4 columns). Keyed on CIG name + Fiscal Year.

cig.description: Cultural Institutions Group member name ('Cultural Institutions Group (CIG)').

operatingSupport.description: Annual operating support in dollars ('Operating Support').
